title: Crispy Earthy Peas Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep Chinese (Zhejiang) dish featuring peas, poached in a light garlic and ginger broth to achieve an earthy flavor with a crisp texture.

ingredients.name: Peas
ingredients.notes: Rinse and pick through to remove any debris

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Peel and grate into small pieces

instructions: Rinse peas, pick through for any debris, then set aside.
In a large saucepan, combine water (or low-sodium broth), minced garlic cloves, grated ginger, and salt to taste. Bring to a boil.
Add the rinsed peas and reduce heat to simmer for 15 minutes or until tender but still crisp.
Serve with additional fresh herbs like cilantro for garnish.
